command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3GB82FZGmc2ADuw.a7b90b108d57 --database jiPvNqaHRUg9H2uZgXUx3J --execute 
-- 22-24 yaş grubu için stage'leri listele
SELECT id, name, ageGroup, `order` FROM stages WHERE ageGroup = '22-24' ORDER BY `order` LIMIT 1;

-- İlk stage'i ata
INSERT INTO user_stages (userId, stageId, status) 
VALUES (240003, (SELECT id FROM stages WHERE ageGroup = '22-24' ORDER BY `order` LIMIT 1), 'active');

-- Kontrol et
SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, s.name 
FROM user_stages us 
JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id 
WHERE us.userId = 240003;

rows.name: Etap 1: Kariyer Geçiş ve Yetkinlik Değerlendirmesi
